arn_of_the_permissions_boundary_policy: ARN of the permissions boundary policy
arn_of_the_principal_to_simulate: ARN of the principal to simulate
aws_region_where_the_role_was_last_used: AWS region where the role was last used
comma_separated_resource_arns_to_simulat: Comma-separated resource ARNs to simulate against
create_a_fresh_iam_access_key_for_a: Create a fresh IAM access key for a user and delete the old one to complete a safe rotation. Use for scheduled key rotation and remediating aged keys.
create_an_iam_user_or_role_attach_manage: Create an IAM user or role, attach managed policies, and place users into groups to grant scoped access. Use for onboarding and standing up service roles.
date_the_role_was_last_used: Date the role was last used
describe_the_actions_you_want_to_check: Describe the actions you want to check
integrate_aws_identity_and_access_manage: Integrate AWS Identity and Access Management into your workflow. Create and manage users, roles, policies, groups, and access keys.
list_iam_users_roles_and_their_attached_: List IAM users, roles, and their attached policies to produce an access audit. Use for security reviews and least-privilege checks.
list_of_attached_managed_policies_with_p: List of attached managed policies with policyName and policyArn
list_of_iam_groups_groupname_groupid_arn: List of IAM groups (groupName, groupId, arn, path, createDate)
list_of_iam_policies_policyname_policyid: List of IAM policies (policyName, policyId, arn, path, attachmentCount, isAttachable, createDate, updateDate)
list_of_iam_roles_rolename_roleid_arn_pa: List of IAM roles (roleName, roleId, arn, path, createDate, description, maxSessionDuration)
list_of_iam_users_username_userid_arn_pa: List of IAM users (userName, userId, arn, path, createDate, passwordLastUsed)
manage_aws_iam_users_roles_policies_and_: Manage AWS IAM users, roles, policies, and groups
maximum_number_of_items_to_return: Maximum number of items to return
policy_simulation_results_per_action_eva: Policy simulation results per action: evalActionName, evalResourceName, evalDecision (allowed/explicitDeny/implicitDeny), matchedStatements (sourcePolicyId, sourcePolicyType), missingContextValues
tags_attached_to_the_resource_key_value_: Tags attached to the resource (key, value pairs)
use_iam_policy_simulation_to_verify_whet: Use IAM policy simulation to verify whether a user or role can perform specific actions on resources. Use for troubleshooting access and validating changes.
